channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Poilievre supports Ontario plan to expand Billy Bishop Airport amid political and community opposition
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has voiced support for the Ontario government’s proposal to expand Toronto’s Billy Bishop Airport, arguing that the move would boost economic activity, improve con...

item.title: Authorities Confirm WHCD Shooting Suspect Fired Weapon in Attempted Assassination of President
item.description: Jeanine Pirro, U.S. attorney for the District of Columbia, confirmed that the suspect involved in the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting definitively fired at a Secret Service agent. Evidence...

item.title: Amnesty International calls for release of detained Kogi activist
item.description: Amnesty International don come out strongly against Kogi State government over the detention of Farouk Onimisi. Dem talk say the arrest na clear violation of human rights and na part of bigger pattern...

item.title: Global markets mixed as US stocks rise and ASX set to fall
item.description: US stock markets reached new highs as several major companies, including Apple and Estee Lauder, reported stronger-than-expected profits for the first quarter of 2026. The S&P 500 increased by 0.3 per...

item.title: Terrorists attack military camp, burn vehicles and loot shops in Zamfara
item.description: On Saturday, May 2, 2026, terrorists carried out a brutal attack on the military camp in Bagega village, located in Anka, Zamfara State. The assailants set part of the camp and two military vehicles a...

item.title: Search Underway for Two U.S. Soldiers Missing After Exercise in Morocco
item.description: Two U.S. Army soldiers have gone missing in southwestern Morocco following their participation in the African Lion military exercise, a large multinational training operation involving more than 30 co...

item.title: Brenda Mtambo to Celebrate Grandmother Through Heritage and Gospel Music
item.description: Brenda Mtambo is preparing to stage 'Amahubo Ka Gogo – The Live Experience,' a heartfelt musical tribute to her late grandmother, the woman who raised her and profoundly influenced her life. The conce...

item.title: Voter Absurdities and Acceptance in West Bengal Elections
item.description: In the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, reporter Anant Gupta shares personal experiences of electoral absurdities that became the new normal for voters. At a Kolkata polling station, a resident jo...

item.title: Few competitive seats will likely decide U.S. House control in upcoming midterms
item.description: The upcoming U.S. midterm elections are shaping up to be determined by an unusually small number of competitive congressional seats. Both Republicans and Democrats have spent much of the past year red...

item.title: SA Men's Relay Teams Take Silver in Gaborone, Set New African Record
item.description: The South African men's 4x100m and 4x400m relay teams delivered strong performances but had to settle for silver at the 2026 Debswana World Athletics Relays in Gaborone on Sunday. The 4x100m team, con...

item.title: Nepal Raises Concerns Over India-China Plan for Kailash Mansarovar Pilgrimage
item.description: The ongoing plan for the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra involving India and China has drawn objections from Nepal. The Himalayan nation has expressed concerns over the route and administrative issues, highl...

item.title: Fatal Hit-and-Run Collision in Playa Del Rey Kills Two, Including a 1-Year-Old
item.description: Two people, including a 1-year-old child, were killed in a tragic hit-and-run crash on Sunday morning in Playa Del Rey, California. The collision occurred around 4:34 a.m. near the intersection of Cul...

item.title: Mother arrested after baby's body discovered in stormwater drain
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded in Lotus River when a one-day-old baby girl was found dead in a stormwater drain on Sunday afternoon. The baby had been last seen with her mother, a 31-year-old woman, on Sa...

item.title: Extensive Spring Flooding in Saskatchewan Forces Road Closures and Strands Residents
item.description: Severe spring flooding has affected multiple regions in Saskatchewan, leading to the closure of over a dozen roads and displacing residents. Near Struthers Lake Regional Park, roughly 126 km northeast...

item.title: CBSE’s Removal of French Threatens Pondicherry’s Cultural and Linguistic Heritage
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has introduced a three-language policy that requires students to learn at least two Indian languages, thereby removing the option to study French, Germa...

item.title: Maple Leafs Appoint Mats Sundin as Senior Executive Adviser and John Chayka as General Manager
item.description: The Toronto Maple Leafs have made significant changes to their front office following a disappointing season that saw the team miss the NHL playoffs. Mats Sundin, the franchise's former captain and al...

item.title: Three Individuals Arrested for Spreading False Claims About UBA Chairman Tony Elumelu
item.description: The United Bank for Africa (UBA) don confirm say dem don arrest three people wey dey spread false and defamatory stories about their Group Chairman, Tony O. Elumelu. The viral claims, wey talk say Elu...

item.title: Heathrow Airport forecasts potential decline in passenger numbers due to Middle East conflict
item.description: Heathrow Airport has issued a warning that passenger numbers for the remainder of the year could be affected by the ongoing conflict in Iran. During the first quarter, 18.9 million passengers passed t...

item.title: Greta Gerwig’s Upcoming 'Narnia: The Magician's Nephew' to Release Globally in February 2027
item.description: Filmmaker Greta Gerwig is preparing for a major cinematic venture with her adaptation of 'The Magician’s Nephew,' a beloved installment of C.S. Lewis' Chronicles of Narnia. The film is scheduled for a...

item.title: Albanese lifts personal approval as fuel crisis response boosts Labor, while One Nation support stabilises
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has recorded a noticeable improvement in his personal approval ratings, driven largely by public support for the government’s handling of the recent fuel price crisis. ...
